skills.name: lv0-code-polisher
skills.description: Improve code quality, readability, structure, and maintainability without changing intended behavior unless the task explicitly asks for it.
skills.codexShortDescription: Clean up code without changing intended behavior
skills.codexDefaultPrompt: Use $lv0-code-polisher to improve code clarity, structure, and maintainability while preserving intended behavior and validating the result.

skills.name: lv0-doc-writer
skills.description: Write or refine technical documentation, usage guides, runbooks, and architecture notes using verified repo facts.
skills.codexShortDescription: Write accurate docs from verified repo facts
skills.codexDefaultPrompt: Use $lv0-doc-writer to inspect the repo, verify commands and behavior claims, write or refine concise documentation, and summarize any remaining gaps.

skills.name: lv0-instruction-core
skills.description: Shared routing layer for the home-root AI setup. Use when choosing folders, composing other shared layers, or creating new repo-specific wrappers.
skills.codexShortDescription: Route work through the shared stack
skills.codexDefaultPrompt: Use $lv0-instruction-core to choose the right shared stack, route context through .ai_shared, keep wrapper-specific behavior thin, and summarize the validation path.

skills.name: lv0-run-transparency
skills.description: Explain the selected skill stack and shared context sources at the start of each run so the user can see how the agent is approaching the task.
skills.codexShortDescription: Show the chosen skill stack and shared context at run start
skills.codexDefaultPrompt: Use $lv0-run-transparency to announce the selected skills, the repo-local and home-level .ai_shared sources you consulted, and why they fit the task before deeper work continues.

skills.name: lv0-home-auditor
skills.description: Lv0 logistics and audit layer for home-folder setup plus the shared local-repo audit baseline. Use it for local config drift, wrapper sync, repo-specific weekly checks, tracked-artifact risk, and cleanup candidates when the global or repo-local audit gate is missing or the home setup may be out of alignment.
skills.codexShortDescription: Run the weekly home-folder alignment audit
skills.codexDefaultPrompt: Use $lv0-home-auditor to check the global home-audit gate and the current repo's weekly audit gate, run the shared local-repo audit baseline, apply any repo-local audit rules, compare managed mirror surfaces to the live home roots when relevant, and summarize cleanup candidates without deleting anything automatically.

skills.name: lv0-repo-onboarding
skills.description: Build working context for an unfamiliar repository using the shared home-root workflows, templates, checklists, and knowledge notes.
skills.codexShortDescription: Map an unfamiliar repo and capture reusable context
skills.codexDefaultPrompt: Use $lv0-repo-onboarding to inspect the repo layout, identify key files and commands, refresh the shared tracker notes, and summarize the next files to inspect.

skills.name: lv0-skill-onboarding
skills.description: Guide the creation or extension of shared lv0 logistics/automation skills, shared lv1 workflows, and repo-prefixed lv2 skills and agents using the shared home-root authoring system.
skills.codexShortDescription: Author or extend shared skills and agents safely
skills.codexDefaultPrompt: Use $lv0-skill-onboarding to choose the right layer, update canonical shared skill definitions in .ai_shared when needed, regenerate the tool wrappers, and summarize the validation.

skills.name: lv1-code-review
skills.description: Review changes using the shared home-root workflows, templates, checklists, and knowledge notes. Use when inspecting a diff or file set for correctness issues, regressions, risky assumptions, missing tests, or overall merge readiness.
skills.codexShortDescription: Review changes for bugs, regressions, and test gaps
skills.codexDefaultPrompt: Use $lv1-code-review to inspect the diff or file set, surface the highest-risk findings first, call out missing validation, and summarize residual risk.

skills.name: lv1-defect-fix
skills.description: Diagnose and fix defects using the shared home-root workflows, templates, checklists, and knowledge notes. Use when debugging unexpected behavior, investigating a regression, repairing a broken path, or shipping a scoped bug fix with clear reasoning and verification.
skills.codexShortDescription: Diagnose and fix a scoped bug
skills.codexDefaultPrompt: Use $lv1-defect-fix to inspect the bug, find the likely root cause, apply the smallest reliable fix, validate it, and summarize any remaining risk.

skills.name: lv1-feature-dev
skills.description: Implement scoped feature work using the shared home-root workflows, templates, checklists, and knowledge notes. Use when adding behavior, expanding a capability, wiring a new integration, or delivering a user-facing enhancement with controlled scope and clear validation.
skills.codexShortDescription: Implement scoped feature work and capture PRD details when needed
skills.codexDefaultPrompt: Use $lv1-feature-dev to inspect context, capture requirements in a PRD when APIs or use cases need to be recorded, plan the smallest safe feature change, implement it, validate it, and summarize the result.

skills.name: lv1-figma-implement-design
skills.description: Implement Figma-driven UI work using the shared feature workflow and repo-specific context. Use when turning a Figma frame, node, or screenshot-backed handoff into repo-appropriate UI code with strong fidelity.
skills.codexShortDescription: Implement scoped Figma-driven UI work with repo fidelity
skills.codexDefaultPrompt: Use $lv1-figma-implement-design to confirm the Figma source, inspect the current UI surface, implement the smallest faithful change in repo conventions, validate both repo behavior and visual fidelity, and summarize any remaining gap.

skills.name: lv1-github-repo-readiness
skills.description: Audit or improve a repository for GitHub-facing sharing, contributor surfaces, and publication decisions after the local repo audit baseline is in place. Use when preparing a repo for internal sharing, public release, contributor onboarding, or publication cleanup across multiple repos.
skills.codexShortDescription: Audit or improve repos for private or public GitHub use
skills.codexDefaultPrompt: Use $lv1-github-repo-readiness to build on the latest $lv0-home-auditor findings, focus on GitHub-facing and publication-specific blockers first, make safe low-risk improvements when appropriate, and summarize the next moves.
